title: Centre for Frontier Technologies and Innovation | World Economic Forum
gist: Promotional WEF landing page for its Centre for Frontier Technologies and Innovation; thin on analysis, it names four priority initiatives (Robotics and Autonomous Mobility, BioBASED, Future of Space, Quantum Economy Network) and cites 125+ business partners and 400+ innovators.

insights.claim: WEF's Centre for Frontier Technologies and Innovation organizes its work around four key initiatives: Robotics and Autonomous Mobility, BioBASED (biotechnology), Future of Space, and the Quantum Economy Network.
insights.speaker: World Economic Forum
insights.so_what: Signals which frontier-tech verticals a major convening body is prioritizing for governance and adoption; a map of where multistakeholder attention is concentrating.
insights.quote: Robotics and Autonomous Mobility... BioBASED... Future of Space... Quantum Economy Network
